records.m_Talk_FRA: It spoke of a prophecy of the world's end.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Every age has had its own visions of the world's end, and every one of them faded into nothing.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The legend of the Golden Vale was no different or better than the rest.

records.m_Talk_FRA: As always, the records were scarce, while real-world problems were endless.

records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet...

records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, as if bewitched, I kept chasing after the Golden Vale.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So the years slipped by in vain...

records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>Administration Failure</color> struck, and the Grand Dimension Crevice erupted across the world.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Here in the Amazon, the sky split apart, and the land itself began to float.

records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O. extermination confirmed. Area Gamma, purification op complete.
